search.query: index="anyrun" source="ANY.RUN Sandbox" sourcetype="ANY.RUN" | table verdict_threat_level_text | rename verdict_threat_level_text as verdict | where verdict != "" | stats count by verdict
index="anyrun" source="ANY.RUN Sandbox" sourcetype="ANY.RUN" | where verdict_threat_level_text != "" | timechart span=1d count BY verdict_threat_level_text

index="anyrun" source="ANY.RUN Sandbox" sourcetype="ANY.RUN" | spath path=mitre{} output=mitre_entry | mvexpand mitre_entry | spath input=mitre_entry path=id output=mitre_id | where mitre_id != "" | stats count by mitre_id | sort -count | head 5 | rename count as "Count" | rename mitre_id as "MITRE ID"

index="anyrun" source="ANY.RUN Sandbox" sourcetype="ANY.RUN" | spath path=tags{} output=tag | mvexpand tag | where tag != "" | stats count by tag | sort -count | head 5 | rename count as "Count" | rename tag as "Tag"

index="anyrun" source="ANY.RUN Sandbox" sourcetype="ANY.RUN" | table main_object, verdict_threat_level_text, permanent_url, _time | sort -_time | head 10 | convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S" ctime(_time) AS date | table main_object, verdict_threat_level_text, permanent_url, date | where main_object != "" | rename main_object as "Main Object" | rename verdict_threat_level_text as "Verdict" | rename permanent_url as "Permanent URL"

| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_domain | eval ioc_type="domain" | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_url | eval ioc_type="url"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_ip | eval ioc_type="ip"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_hash | eval ioc_type="hash"] | where confidence == "High" | eventstats max(created) AS task_created BY anyrun_task_url | sort 0 - task_created anyrun_task_url | streamstats count AS row_in_task BY anyrun_task_url | eval first_of_task = if(row_in_task=1, 1, 0) | streamstats sum(first_of_task) AS task_rank | where task_rank <= 10 and confidence == "High" | sort -task_created -created | stats count AS tasks_count, values(ioc_type) AS ioc_type by ioc_value | table ioc_value, ioc_type, tasks_count | sort -tasks_count | rename tasks_count as "Analysis Count" | rename ioc_type as "IOC Type" | rename ioc_value as "IOC Value"

| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_domain | eval ioc_type="domain" | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_url | eval ioc_type="url"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_ip | eval ioc_type="ip"] | append [| inputlookup anyrun_sandbox_ioc_hash | eval ioc_type="hash"] | where confidence == "Medium" | eventstats max(created) AS task_created BY anyrun_task_url | sort 0 - task_created anyrun_task_url | streamstats count AS row_in_task BY anyrun_task_url | eval first_of_task = if(row_in_task=1, 1, 0) | streamstats sum(first_of_task) AS task_rank | where task_rank <= 10 and confidence == "Medium" | sort -task_created -created | stats count AS tasks_count, values(ioc_type) AS ioc_type by ioc_value | table ioc_value, ioc_type, tasks_count | sort -tasks_count | rename tasks_count as "Analysis Count" | rename ioc_type as "IOC Type" | rename ioc_value as "IOC Value"
